scripts.check: pnpm run check:client && pnpm run check:server && pnpm run check:web
scripts.check:client: pnpm --filter chump-agent run typecheck && pnpm --filter chump-agent run test && pnpm --filter chump-agent run build
scripts.check:server: uv run --project server pytest server/tests && uv run --project server python -m compileall -q server/chump_server && uv build server
scripts.check:web: pnpm --filter web run check && pnpm --filter web run test && pnpm --filter web run build
